basics.name: Kasper Laine
basics.summary: Versatile professional with strong communication and project management skills
basics.about: Organized and adaptable professional with proven experience in customer engagement, content creation, and team collaboration. Skilled at managing projects from conception to completion, building relationships, and delivering results in fast-paced environments. Seeking a role where I can apply my communication, organizational, and problem-solving abilities.

work.name: Joblink Oy
work.summary: Provided customer service in retail environment with focus on customer satisfaction. Managed point-of-sale systems, handled transactions accurately, and maintained clean, organized store environment.

work.name: Alfons Digital Oy
work.summary: Managed digital projects and content development for multiple clients. Coordinated workflows, maintained project timelines, and ensured quality deliverables. Collaborated with cross-functional teams and communicated regularly with stakeholders.

work.name: Helsinki Business College Oy
work.summary: Managed social media presence and created engaging content for student audience. Developed content strategy, planned campaigns, and analyzed engagement metrics. Built community and increased student participation through consistent, creative content.

work.name: McDonald's
work.summary: Worked in fast-paced restaurant environment managing multiple tasks simultaneously. Provided excellent customer service, maintained food safety standards, and collaborated effectively with team members. Consistently met targets and received positive customer feedback.

work.name: Helsinki Business College Oy
work.summary: Organized and coordinated large-scale streaming event. Managed live operations, moderated community interactions, and ensured positive participant experience. Demonstrated leadership, adaptability, and strong organizational skills.

work.name: Helsingin kaupunki
work.summary: Provided customer support and technical guidance to diverse user groups. Excelled in troubleshooting, user education, and creating clear documentation. Demonstrated strong problem-solving and patience in high-pressure situations.

education.summary: Currently pursuing degree with focus on practical project work and collaboration. Gaining experience in team-based development, communication with stakeholders, and managing complex projects with multiple stakeholders.
Completed vocational qualification with emphasis on practical, real-world applications.
